input_name: Armaf Club de Nuit Intense Man
description: A smoky pineapple-and-birch fragrance built on the famous Creed Aventus profile: bright fruit up top, dry smoked wood underneath. Strong projection and long wear, best for evenings, work and cooler weather.

input_name: Al Haramain Amber Oud Gold Edition Extreme (Extrait de Parfum, 100ml)
description: A stronger, sweeter take on the popular Amber Oud Gold: juicy melon and pineapple over warm cedar, vanilla and musk. Very long-lasting and heavy in projection, suited to evening wear and special occasions.
identification_note: Sold as "Pure Perfume" / Extrait de Parfum. Distinct from the standard Amber Oud Gold Edition.

input_name: Al Haramain Amber Oud Ruby Edition (120ml)
description: Saffron and bitter almond over cedar and jasmine, drying down to warm ambergris and musk. A rich, slightly spicy-nutty scent that works well in the evening and in cooler weather.

input_name: Fragrance World Intense Noir Le Parfum
description: A fruity-smoky masculine scent: pineapple and blackcurrant over smoked birch wood with a soft vanilla-musk finish. An affordable take on the Aventus style, good for daily wear and evenings.
identification_note: No Fragrantica entry located; notes confirmed across multiple UAE/retail listings. Marketed as inspired by Creed Aventus.

description: A sweet gourmand centred on coffee and butterscotch, lifted by saffron and a touch of pineapple. Cosy and dessert-like, best for evenings and cool weather.
A sweet berry-and-rose scent with vanilla, amber and a light oud base. Playful and feminine, good for daytime and casual evening wear.
identification_note: The rose-gold bottle is the product sold as "Jazzab Gold"; Ard Al Zaafaran markets it simply as Jazzab in some markets.

description: A creamy, powdery vanilla with tropical fruit and a soft floral opening. Very sweet and long-lasting on skin and clothes; a popular everyday scent for women.
identification_note: The original Yara (pink-purple bottle), not the Yara Moi or Yara Tous flankers.

description: Boozy cherry and raspberry over rose and jasmine, settling into warm vanilla, tonka and sandalwood. Rich and sweet, best for evenings and going out.
Creamy coconut and apple over a rose-jasmine heart with powdery heliotrope, finishing on vanilla and soft woods. Feminine and easy to wear day or evening.
identification_note: There is no Khadlaj flanker called "Nuha Rose". The pink pearlescent bottle with the jewelled gold cap is the ORIGINAL Nuha (2023), which carries rose in its heart. The other Nuha flankers are Vanilla Pearl, Cherry Blush and Bon Bon.

input_name: Khadlaj Panache Bon Bon / Khadlaj Nuha Bonbon (same bottle)
description: A milky strawberry-and-peach gourmand with an ice-cream and orange blossom heart over rich vanilla. Sweet and dessert-like, good for casual daytime wear.
identification_note: SAME PRODUCT as list items 10 and 11 — merged into this single entry. No Khadlaj product called "Panache Bon Bon" exists; the iridescent bottle with the ornate gold crown cap is Nuha Bon Bon. The Panache line (e.g. Panache Angel Dust) uses similar styling, which is the likely source of the confusion.

description: A rich white-floral scent — rose, jasmine sambac and tuberose — resting on creamy sandalwood, vanilla and tonka. Elegant and warm, suited to evenings and formal occasions.
identification_note: Niche Emarati is a Lattafa sub-line; sold as "Niche Emarati Lujain".

description: A dry, masculine woody-aromatic: oud and cedar with a herbal lavender-sage heart over patchouli and vetiver. Serious and mature, good for work and evening wear.
identification_note: The dark green juice in the gold lattice cage bottle is the men's version; there is a matching Qimmah for Women.

description: Bright orange and bergamot over orange blossom and jasmine, grounded in musk and sandalwood. Clean and fresh — a good daytime and hot-weather choice for men or women.
identification_note: Sold under the Lattafa Pride sub-line; olive-green matte bottle.

description: A creamy pistachio dessert scent with cacao, whipped cream and coconut over milky vanilla. Sweet and comforting, best for casual wear and cooler evenings.
Juicy mandarin and berries opening onto rich gardenia and tuberose, drying down to creamy coconut, musk and sandalwood. Feminine and glamorous, suited to evenings and occasions.
identification_note: Afnan does not make a product literally named "Lynked Gold". The gold bottle is retailed as "Lynked Forever Gold" and is listed on Fragrantica simply as Lynked Forever. The men's counterpart in the same line is Lynked Freedom.

description: A banoffee-pie gourmand: banana and caramel over vanilla cream with a biscuit and praline base. Very sweet and playful, best for casual wear and cooler weather.
Crisp apple and mandarin over jasmine and ylang-ylang, settling into warm vanilla and musk. A soft, feminine everyday scent that works well in the daytime.
Juicy cherry and strawberry over lily of the valley and jasmine, finishing on soft amber, vanilla and musk. Bright and youthful — an easy daytime scent.
identification_note: Retailed as "Niche Emarati Taraf"; Fragrantica lists it simply as Taraf under Lattafa Perfumes.

description: A sparkling berry scent — raspberry, cherry and strawberry with grapefruit — over clean musk and patchouli. Fun and fresh, ideal for daytime and warm weather.
A boozy cognac-and-raspberry opening with cinnamon, moving into caramel and rose over oak, cedar and ambroxan. Warm and rich — an evening and cold-weather scent for men or women.
identification_note: Sold under the Lattafa Pride sub-line; widely compared to Kilian Angels' Share.
